untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic z-score thresholds (entryZscore and exitZscore as free parameters) and rolling mean/standard deviation computed over an optimizable lookback period. The allowed indicators list does not include raw z-score calculations or parameterized Bollinger Bands with custom z-score inputs. Bollinger Bands (bb_upper, bb_middle, bb_lower) are fixed at 2 standard deviations and cannot be adjusted to arbitrary entryZscore or exitZscore values. The signal also requires half-life optimization logic which is not supported by the allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Bollinger Bands (which represent ±2σ from mean) as a proxy, but this does not capture the full flexibility of the signal's parameterized z-score entry/exit framework. A proper implementation would require custom indicator support for variable z-score bands or direct access to rolling mean and standard deviation calculations.
